nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 印度尼西亚
nodes.summary: 印度尼西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联297种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、白腹麻鸭、太平洋黑鴨等297种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴布亚新几内亚
nodes.summary: 巴布亚新几内亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括白腹麻鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、Shining bronze cuckoo等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
nodes.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括白眉田雞、Bates's nightjar、Bates's swift等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: White-eyed robin
nodes.summary: White-eyed robin（White-eyed robin，学名 Pachycephalopsis poliosoma），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于理查德·鮑德勒·夏普、印度尼西亚、巴布亚新几内亚，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-eyed robin (Pachycephalopsis poliosoma) is a medium-sized bird weighing between 35 and 42 grams and measuring around 15 to 16.5 centimeters in length. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-eyed robin (Pachycephalopsis poliosoma) is a medium-sized bird weighing between 35 and 42 grams and measuring around 15 to 16.5 centimeters in length. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-eyed robin (Pachycephalopsis poliosoma) is a medium-sized bird weighing between 35 and 42 grams and measuring around 15 to 16.5 centimeters in length. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It lives in the hills and montane forests of New Guinea, where it prefers areas with lots of plants and trees. These spots provide good cover and plenty of food. The white-eyed robin often sits on low branches, where it monitors the ground, watching for prey. Its habitat is similar to that of other robins, such as the blue-gray (Thraupis episcopus) and smoky robins (Peneothello cryptoleuca). Each tends to stick to a specific level within the forest, minimizing competition. The white-eyed robin shares its habitat with many other species, showing how adaptable it is. These forests vary greatly in temperature and elevation, requiring flexibility

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The white-eyed robin faces no urgent threats. However, its habitat is at risk due to deforestation and other human activities
